posts.author: DC_MONDAY (ismaël)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am currently encountering an issue integrating a webhook between Monday.com and the Make automation platform. Despite several attempts and verifications, I still cannot establish the connection. I am reaching out for your assistance in identifying and resolving this issue.

Context:

• Objective: Send information from a Monday.com board to Make using a webhook.

• Trigger used: “When an item is created, send a webhook”.

• Webhook URL: I used the URL generated by Make (e.g., https://hook.us1.make.com/…).

• Board in question: Candidat Audition.

Problem Encountered:

When I configure the webhook URL in the Monday.com integration, I consistently receive the following error message:

“Failed to communicate with the provided URL.”

What I have already verified:

  1. URL: The URL has been copied and pasted correctly without spaces.

  2. Webhook Activation: I enabled listening mode in Make by clicking “Run once” or “Redetermine data structure”.

  3. Direct Connection: When testing the URL in a browser, it successfully returns a response “Accepted”.

  4. Firewall and IP: I have not identified any firewall restrictions blocking HTTP requests.

  5. Test with Webhook.site: The Webhook.site URL successfully receives requests, which confirms that HTTP requests are being sent correctly from Monday.com.

Question:

Could you help me understand why Monday.com cannot communicate with the webhook URL from Make? Are there any specific configurations to check or settings to adjust?

Thank you in advance for your assistance. I remain available to provide any additional information or perform tests as needed.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you setup Make webhook to return the challenge from the monday webhook the very first time (when you configure the recipe in monday)? See Webhooks

posts.author: DC_MONDAY (ismaël)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, I did
What can I do now?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DC_MONDAY

The easiest way to do Make webhooks for monday is to use the monday specific webhook module, “Watch Events”. The challenge response is already build in.
